font_families.reason: Dense, clear, neutral, readable at smaller sizes — suited for information-heavy surfaces
Friendly, versatile, readable — works across device sizes with a warm but professional feel

fonts: Canela-style serif paired with a stable sans
font_families.reason: Adds authority, taste, and emotion — reserve for brands where craftsmanship is the value proposition
Precise, low-friction, high legibility — works well alongside monospace code fonts

fonts: Clash Display for headlines with a calmer sans for body
font_families.reason: Energy and edge without sacrificing readability — combine a display headline face with a calmer body sans

landing_page.headline_guidance: Large display treatment — hero headline should command the viewport within the first viewport.

dashboard.headline_guidance: 20–24px page title. 28–40px main KPI number depending on density preference.

form.headline_guidance: Keep form headline short and task-based: 'Create account' or 'Set up your workspace' — under 6 words.

onboarding.headline_guidance: Headline focus on the next value step, not brand poetry. Under 8 words.

pricing.headline_guidance: Price number large and bold. Benefit headline above feature list. CTA directly beneath price.

settings.headline_guidance: Section headers clear but not dominant — the content should lead, not the label.

navigation.headline_guidance: Labels concise. Active state typographically distinct (weight or color, not both).

line_length_guidance.dashboard: No body copy wrapping — use data, numbers, and labels at natural widths
line_length_guidance.form: Full-width inputs for most fields; narrow postal/zip, phone, and short code fields
